name: observability-plus
description: Cost tracking + token tracking + debug snapshot routes + telemetry recorder. Owns /v1/costs/* (registerCostRoutes). Telemetry / debug helpers stay reachable to other bridge files via require('../modules/observability-plus/<name>'). raw-logs.ts intentionally stays in core because it's required at the top of bridge/server.ts (LOG_DIR / SESSION_FILE_PATH constants used during boot) and disabling it would silence every harness's append-only log.
